name: full-evidence-allow
doc: The complete PreToolUse gate chain driven to a FULL ALLOW (the closing arc of test/handle.test.ts:29-48). Freshness is earned via the SubagentStop harvest (07's mechanism, forced 'sufficient' with no response-length dependency — robust), then doc consultation is credited by two PostToolUse MCP calls (Context7 + Exa; docSourceOf → recordDoc, activity.ts:44-52 / session-state.ts:44 — no length requirement). With freshness + doc satisfied and solidReadGate off (empty refs dir), the same Write finally passes every gate → allow, with the one-time '✓ evidence fresh' compliance notice (v0.1.57). isDocConsulted is session-scoped (satisfied by any Context7+Exa this session, proven by handle.test where generic-framework MCP posts unblock a react Write).

steps.doc: SubagentStop harvest → explore + research credited (forced sufficient).
Write again → freshness passes, now blocked on doc consultation (contains 'documentation'). Identical to step 1 → anti-loop adds [REPEAT]; substring still holds.

steps.doc: PostToolUse Context7 doc call → recordDoc credits 'context7'. No response length needed for a doc credit.
PostToolUse Exa doc call → recordDoc credits 'exa'. Both Context7 AND Exa now satisfy isDocConsulted (apex.ts:48-49).

Every gate passes (freshness via harvest + doc via MCP; solidReadGate off) → allow. NOT empty anymore: pre-allow.ts's freshEvidenceNotice fires the ONE-TIME '✓ evidence fresh' compliance systemMessage on this first passing Write (v0.1.57). Mirrors handle.test.ts:42-48.
